meaning: interrupted continuous waves [无]断续(等幅)波
examples: An insecticide ICW - 98 for the cocoon and silk warehouse was prepared.
ICW and ECW retrieved by ideal body weight may be sensitive parameters to determine the dry weight in patients with MHD.
It is pointed out that ICW occurs in the pycnocline and superimposes on the pycnocline due to the buoyancy effect of Taiwan Warm Current water with high density.
